title: Help Setting Up CRM and Contacts
excerpt:
Hello! 
Is anyone available to help me get started with Monday.com this weekend?  I would like to begin with CRM and contacts. 
Thanks, 
Jennifer

posts.author: JenniferB (Jennifer Biddle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

Is anyone available to help me get started with Monday.com this weekend? I would like to begin with CRM and contacts.

Thanks,
Jennifer

posts.author: AnthonytheEngineer (Anthony Gude)
posts.cookedHtml: Sure, I can help . you may email me on gude.sullivan@gmail.com . Just put the title of the thread in the subject line and ill be free in a few hours

posts.author: JenniferB (Jennifer Biddle)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Anthony, I emailed you but never heard back.

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JenniferB sorry I couldn’t get to you this weekend but if you’d like some help getting set up with monday.com feel free to email me at tim@timlittletech.com. I should have time tomorrow to do a 30m free consultation to get you started and see if you need more help getting setup.

best!

posts.author: LaurenBemister (Lauren Bemister)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jennifer!

If you are still looking for help, I’d be happy to meet with you and see if our team might be able to assist you.

A bit about us, our team has specialized in Monday.com for three years now, and we love the software! Our team consists of Monday.com experts, project managers, and a developer/﻿Zapier expert, so you will never have to wait for answers. We provide an all-in-one system, where we dream up and implement the processes you need with ease and provide ongoing support.

We offer a complimentary 1-hour initial meeting to review your current setup, and I can show you options going forward. You can book a session through this link(Calendly - Lauren Bemister )

I look forward to hearing from you.

Lauren
Kick Consulting
(https://www.kickconsulting.com.au/)

posts.author: Andrew1 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jennifer,
What you are wanting done is well within my area of expertise and I would be happy to help you out on this.
You can reach me on andrewjohnson56782@gmail.com
Best Wishes,
Andrew

posts.author: jennaioi (Jenna Mac Killop)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Jennifer, I manage our monday.com team here at IO Integration.
Feel free to send me an email if you’d like to have an intro call with us this week.
jenna.mackillop@iointegration.com. We love talking about monday.com and we we are working on lots of CRM projects currently. Thank you!

posts.author: Bianca (Bianca Clement)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JenniferB , just checking if you’d found a resolution to this?
It sounds like something I could resolve within a couple of days for you.
Feel free to email me at biancajclement@gmail.com if you’re still seeking assistance.
